data.title: Epson RapidReceipt RR-600W Document Scanner Named a Good Housekeeping 2026 Cleaning Awards Winner
data.description: In a recent announcement on April 6, 2026, Epson introduced RapidReceipt® RR-600W Wireless Receipt and Document Scanner aimed at transforming household paperwork into intelligent digital assets to support AI workflows. This initiative by RapidReceipt facilitates the setup of effective home offices, streamlining daily tasks.

data.title: Vertical Aerospace Achieves Historic Piloted Thrustborne Transition
data.description: In a significant development, global aerospace and technology company Vertical Aerospace (NYSE: EVTL) has made history by successfully executing a piloted thrustborne transition with a full-scale eVTOL aircraft. This achievement marks a major milestone in aviation, as the aircraft was able to take off vertically similar to a helicopter and smoothly transition into wingborne flight akin to a fixed-wing aircraft. This breakthrough showcases the defining capability of eVTOL aviation and positions Vertical as a key player in this emerging industry.

data.title: KBR to Hold First Quarter Earnings Conference Call
data.description: Houston-based KBR (NYSE: KBR) will conduct a conference call on May 5, 2026, at 7:30 a.m. CT (8:30 a.m. ET) to deliberate on its first quarter financial performance. The company intends to release its earnings report and presentation for the first quarter of 2026 before the scheduled call, with both documents accessible on KBR's website.

data.title: KRISPY KREME® Releases Its Sweetest Spring Doughnut Drop Yet
data.description: In Charlotte, North Carolina, Krispy Kreme® is rolling out its new Spring Seasonal Collection, featuring four doughnuts that embody the essence of spring. This collection marks the second of five seasonal releases in the year, offering fans an array of choices and flavors to enjoy. Included are two new indulgent flavors and two popular favorites making a comeback. Celebrating freshness and renewal, the Spring Seasonal Collection gives customers more reasons to indulge and share the love with others.

data.title: Experian launches No Ding Decline™ for personal loans, perfect for peak season spending. #finance #loans
data.description: A new report indicates that the global market for electric vehicles (EVs) is projected to reach $802.81 billion by 2027, with a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 22.6%. The current market value is estimated at $162.34 billion in 2019. The growing demand for eco-friendly transportation options and advancements in battery technology are driving the increase in sales of EVs worldwide. Major players in this market include Tesla, Nissan, General Motors, and BMW. The Asia Pacific region is anticipated to dominate the market share due to government initiatives promoting EV adoption. The increasing focus on reducing carbon emissions and the availability of charging infrastructure are expected to further boost the EV market in the coming years.

data.title: DataBeyond Unveils Asia's Largest Unmanned AI Sorting Center, Setting a New Circular Economy Benchmark
data.description: On April 6, 2026, DataBeyond, a renowned company specializing in AI-driven sorting technology, announced the progress of its pioneering project in Taichung, Taiwan. The project, which stands as Asia's largest unmanned intelligent sorting facility for various types of mixed plastics, has advanced to a new stage.
